title: How Poor Sleep Affects Your Hormones After 40 (And What to Do About It)
seo_title: How Poor Sleep Affects Hormones After 40 (And Fixes)
meta_description: Poor sleep disrupts cortisol, estrogen, insulin, and thyroid hormones after 40. Learn the sleep-hormone connection and how to break the cycle.
tags: Sleep, Hormones, Cortisol, Perimenopause, Magnesium, Women Over 40
